channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/3/17)
channel.description: 嘿，今天的技术圈依然围绕着 AI 和编程工具在高速运转。我帮你梳理了一下，发现几个特别有意思的点：首先是 **AI 编程助手（特别是 Claude Code）** 相关的讨论和工具非常多，从安全漏洞到用量监控，大家都很关心怎么用好它。其次是 **AI Agent（智能体）** 的生态越来越热闹了，不仅有新的开发框架，还有专门为它们设计的硬件发布。最后，关于 **代码生成的质量与速度** 的学术研究也浮出水面，这可能是每个开发者都应该思考的问题。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 嘿，今天的技术圈依然围绕着 AI 和编程工具在高速运转。我帮你梳理了一下，发现几个特别有意思的点：首先是 **AI 编程助手（特别是 Claude Code）** 相关的讨论和工具非常多，从安全漏洞到用量监控，大家都很关心怎么用好它。其次是 **AI Agent（智能体）** 的生态越来越热闹了，不仅有新的开发框架，还有专门为它们设计的硬件发布。最后，关于 **代码生成的质量与速度** 的学术研究也浮出水面，这可能是每个开发者都应该思考的问题。

item.title: garrytan/gstack
item.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 10 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA | 近期热门 | 总 17570 stars
item.author: garrytan

item.title: THU-MAIC/OpenMAIC
item.description: Open Multi-Agent Interactive Classroom — Get an immersive, multi-agent learning experience in just one click | 近期热门 | 总 2314 stars
item.author: THU-MAIC

item.title: calesthio/Crucix
item.description: Your personal intelligence agent. Watches the world from multiple data sources and pings you when something changes. | 近期热门 | 总 2031 stars
item.author: calesthio

item.title: pasky/chrome-cdp-skill
item.description: Give your AI agent access to your live Chrome session — works out of the box, connects to tabs you already have open | 近期热门 | 总 1903 stars
item.author: pasky

item.title: aiming-lab/AutoResearchClaw
item.description: Fully autonomous research from idea to paper. Chat an Idea. Get a Paper. Fully Autonomous. 🦞 | 近期热门 | 总 1585 stars
item.author: aiming-lab

item.title: Infatoshi/OpenSquirrel
item.description: For people who get distracted by agents. A native Rust/GPUI control plane for running Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode side by side — because if you're going to be squirrely, you might as well optimize for it. | 近期热门 | 总 822 stars
item.author: Infatoshi

item.title: RightNow-AI/autokernel
item.description: Autoresearch for GPU kernels. Give it any PyTorch model, go to sleep, wake up to optimized Triton kernels. | 近期热门 | 总 662 stars
item.author: RightNow-AI

item.title: KeyID-AI/agent-kit
item.description: Give Claude/Cursor email powers. 27 MCP tools — inbox, send, reply, contacts, search. Free, no signup. | 近期热门 | 总 473 stars
item.author: KeyID-AI

item.title: nikmcfly/MiroFish-Offline
item.description: Offline multi-agent simulation & prediction engine. English fork of MiroFish with Neo4j + Ollama local stack. | 近期热门 | 总 316 stars
item.author: nikmcfly

item.title: aidenybai/element-source
item.description: Get the source file location of any DOM element. Works with React, Vue, Svelte, Solid | 近期热门 | 总 269 stars
item.author: aidenybai
